analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.fireworks.ai covered 353 pages with 100.28% crawl coverage and 91.5% overall confidence. Critical issues include 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links, 24.65% SEO/geo issue rate, and 0% example reliability estimate. API reference coverage stands at 71.27% across 159 detected API pages. Freshness metadata is present on only 1.7% of pages, severely limiting visibility into content currency.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage (100.28%) with 353 pages successfully examined
Strong API documentation presence with 159 API pages detected and 71.27% reference coverage
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification (95%) and crawl confidence (95%)
No repository navigation broken links (repo_broken_links_count: 0), indicating clean internal infrastructure
Zero trap URLs or crawl scope issues across 365 requested pages
risks: Zero example reliability (0.0%) indicates code examples are untested, outdated, or detection failed entirely
24.65% SEO/geo issue rate threatens discoverability and search ranking for quarter of documentation
2 confirmed broken internal documentation links create poor user experience and navigation dead-ends
Freshness metadata on only 1.7% of pages prevents users from assessing content currency and trustworthiness
28.73% API reference gap leaves significant portion of API surface undocumented or undetected
85% API confidence suggests potential detection limitations in API page classification
Multi-project topology without version control visibility may hide documentation drift across product lines

prioritized_actions.action: Implement automated example testing pipeline to validate all code samples and establish baseline reliability metric
Fix 2 confirmed broken internal documentation links and establish link monitoring to prevent future breakage
Add last-updated timestamps to all 353 pages (currently 1.7% coverage) using automated git commit date injection
Audit and remediate SEO/geo issues affecting 87 pages (24.65%) focusing on meta descriptions, titles, and structured data
Close 28.73% API reference gap by documenting missing endpoints or improving API page detection patterns

limitations: External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code example correctness, or alignment with actual API behavior
0% example reliability may indicate detection methodology limitations rather than actual example quality issues
Freshness assessment limited to visible metadata; cannot determine actual content update recency from git history or CMS
API coverage detection at 85% confidence suggests some API pages may be misclassified or use non-standard documentation patterns
Cannot assess documentation completeness against actual product feature set or internal engineering specifications
